default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://i.ytimg.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; connect-src 'none'; media-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' mailto:; upgrade-insecure-requests;
